shownotes: Altered Beast I contained an Alter Me intro.  Alter Me II was played for the first time since 2022-10-31 (177 shows) and contained Hypertension quotes and teases and Forty Six & 2 (Tool) teases. Altered Beast IV contained Hypertension teases.  Hypertension contained Riff Raff (AC/DC), Forty Six & 2 (Tool) and Sad Pilot teases. Muddy Water and The Bitter Boogie were performed as a mashup with parts of each song interspersed throughout the other.  Sad Pilot contained teases of The Bitter Boogie and Machine Gun (Jimi Hendrix).  The band's guitar tech Gaspard, introduced as Gary, played drums on Le Risque while Cavs performed his verse from the front of the stage and stayed on drums for the rest of the song.  Motor Spirit was introduced as a song about cars.  Ambrose quoted The Next Episode (Dr. Dre & Snoop Dogg) in Motor Spirit after the band took shots following Gila Monster. At the end of the show the band shouted out opener Barkaa and Joey said "from the river to the sea, free Palestine."  The written setlist had Raw Feel listed as Raw Phil, Muddy Water and The Bitter Boogie listed as Muddy Boogie // Bitter Water, Sad Pilot listed as Rad Pilot and Hot Wax listed as Hot Phacts.
